mechanism: The basis trade is the primary amplification mechanism that can accelerate the doom loop from slow burn to acute phase. A fiscal-supply-driven selloff triggers basis trade unwinds, forcing dealer balance sheet compression and further selling in a reflexive cascade.
regime_dependence: Amplification is strongest when dealer balance sheets are constrained and Fed intervention capacity is limited by inflationary context. SRF may dampen in routine stress but is untested at crisis scale.
